<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk008.pdf#page=25 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p398 -->

<!-- header: NYMPHENBURG, HAUPTSCHLOSS -->


[[File:Band03-2_chunk008_p025_img001.jpg|thumb|B Gastmahl im Hause des Pharisäers]]



[[File:Band03-2_chunk008_p025_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p399 -->
